q: There is 뒤에는 어떤 명사가 오나요?

There were의 뜻으로 알맞은 것은?

다음 중 어법상 올바른 문장은?
o: There are a pen on the table.

There were a pen on the table.

q: 다음 중 어법상 올바른 문장은?
o: There is many books in the room.

There are a book in the room.
There were many book in the room.
